header.description: Creates an Angular component with a header.

orval-config.description: Adds orval to the project, create a config file and an empty openapi spec file

docker-config.description: Adds a Dockerfile and docker-compose.yaml to the project

sonar-config.description: Adds SonarQube configuration to the project

npm-config.description: Adds NPM configuration files (.npmrc and .nvmrc) to the project

lint-config.description: Adds ESLint, Prettier, and EditorConfig configuration files to the project

otel-config.description: Adds OpenTelemetry Collector configuration and configures nginx to proxy OTLP exports

gitignore-config.description: Adds a .gitignore file to the project

adr.description: Generates an Architecture Decision Record (ADR) markdown file

k8s-config.description: Adds Kubernetes Deployment, Service, and Ingress manifests to the project

ado-config.description: Adds an Azure DevOps default pull request template to the project

github-config.description: Adds standard GitHub project files — PR template, issue templates, CI workflow, and Dependabot config
